channel.title: 2026-04-06 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-06 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Pairing-based graph neural network for simulating quantum materials
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Di Luo, David D. Dai, and Liang Fu
Author(s): Di Luo, David D. Dai, and Liang Fu We develop a pairing-based graph neural network for simulating quantum many-body systems. Our architecture augments a BCS-type geminal wave function with a generalized pair amplitude parametrized by a graph neural network. Variational Monte Carlo with our neural network simultaneously provides an ac… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 165107] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: [ASAP] Magnetic-Field-Induced Spin Polarization Boosts Piezoelectric SrFeO3-Catalyzed H2O2 Production
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Zhen Zhang, Zhong-Xu Yuan, Wen-Hua Yang, Zhao-Jian Li, Yu-Ze Sun, Jin-Hua Liu, Jia Zheng, Chun-Yang Xiao, Fang-Yuan Zhu, Yong Wang, Wen-Peng Han, Yun-Ze Long, and Hong-Di Zhang
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00441

item.title: Antitopological magnetic textures in an antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer with frustration
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Lewei Zhou, Jun Chen, Zhong Shen, Shuai Dong, and Xiaoyan Yao
Author(s): Lewei Zhou, Jun Chen, Zhong Shen, Shuai Dong, and Xiaoyan Yao The bilayer skyrmion composed of upper and lower tightly coupled skyrmions on two layers with completely compensated topological charges (called as antitopology here), has become one feasible improvement of conventional skyrmion to realize straight motion without skyrmion Hall effect, which has arou… [Phys. Rev. B 113, L140403] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Dynamical correlations and Mott localization in a paramagnetic VI₃ bulk crystal
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Luis Craco and Sabrina S. Carara
Author(s): Luis Craco and Sabrina S. Carara We perform a comprehensive study on the correlated electronic structure reconstruction of paramagnetic VI₃ crystal in its rhombohedral and monoclinic structural phases. Using density-functional plus dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT) calculations, we explicitl… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 155113] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: 勘误表：用绝缘反铁磁材料产生纯自旋电流 [物理。莱特牧师。 135、146703（2025）]
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Yingwei Chen, Junyi Ji, Liangliang Hong, Xiangang Wan, and Hongjun Xiang
作者：陈英伟，季俊毅，洪亮亮，万贤刚，向洪军 [Phys.莱特牧师。 136, 149901] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 6 日星期一

item.title: Growth-controlled twinning and magnetic anisotropy in CeSb₂
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Jan T. Weber, Kristin Kliemt, Sergey L. Bud'ko, Paul C. Canfield, and Cornelius Krellner
Author(s): Jan T. Weber, Kristin Kliemt, Sergey L. Bud'ko, Paul C. Canfield, and Cornelius Krellner Cerium diantimonide (CeSb₂) is a layered heavy-fermion Kondo lattice material that hosts complex magnetism and pressure-induced superconductivity. The interpretation of its in-plane anisotropy has remained unsettled due to structural twinning, which superimposes orthogonal magnetic r… [Phys. Rev. Materials 10, 044403] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: High-temperature quantum anomalous Hall effect in buckled honeycomb antiferromagnets
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Mohsen Hafez-Torbati and Götz S. Uhrig
Author(s): Mohsen Hafez-Torbati and Götz S. Uhrig We propose Néel antiferromagnetic (AF) Mott insulators with a buckled honeycomb structure as potential candidates to host a high-temperature AF Chern insulator (AFCI). Using a generalized Kondo lattice model, we show that the staggered potential induced by a perpendicular electric field due to the b… [Phys. Rev. B 113, L161105] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Interlayer exchange coupling via magnetic proximity effect in amorphous trilayers
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Asgeir Tryggvason, Snorri Ingvarsson, and Fridrik Magnus
Author(s): Asgeir Tryggvason, Snorri Ingvarsson, and Fridrik Magnus We have studied ferromagnetic resonance in amorphous trilayers of Coₓ(Al₀.₇₀Zr₀.₃₀)₁−ₓ. The trilayer composition is such that the outer layers are ferromagnetic, with distinct resonance frequencies, while the spacer layer composition is nominally pa… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 144410] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Isoreticular Modulation of Electrical Conduction and Magnetic Properties in Semiconducting Lanthanide‐based Based Metal−Organic Frameworks
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Huilin Qing, Brian G. Diamond, Joseph Y. M. Chan, Christopher H. Hendon, Weiyang Li, Katherine A. Mirica
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.

item.title: Magnetoelectric effect in the mixed valence polyoxovanadate cage V₁₂
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Piotr Kozłowski
Author(s): Piotr Kozłowski Development of spintronic and quantum computing devices increases demand for efficient, energy saving method of spin manipulation at molecular scale. Polyoxovanadate molecular magnets being susceptible to both electric and magnetic fields may serve here as a good base material. In this paper, two is… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134409] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: 超导涨落体系中少层 NbSe2 的磁阻振荡
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Xiaolong Yin, Congzhe Cao, Yibin Feng, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Jiawei Mei, Qi-Kun Xue, and Shuo-Ying Yang
作者：Xiaolong Yin、Congzhe Cao、Yibin Feng、Kenji Watanabe、Takashi Taniguchi、Jiawei Mei、Qi-Kun Xu 和 Shuo-Ying Yang NbSe 2 薄膜中磁阻振荡的观察，让人想起 Little-Parks 振荡，与之前报道的其他振荡不同，它归因于超导相位波动。 [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 146301] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 6 日星期一

item.title: Memristive spin-orbit-torque switching in a chirally coupled synthetic antiferromagnet for neuromorphic pattern recognition
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Aihua Tang, Junwei Zeng, Hao Bai, Shengchun Shen, Wanjun Jiang, Jiahao Liu, and Teng Xu
Author(s): Aihua Tang, Junwei Zeng, Hao Bai, Shengchun Shen, Wanjun Jiang, Jiahao Liu, and Teng Xu Spintronic devices have emerged as promising candidates for neuromorphic computing, owing to their nonvolatility and plasticity that enable the emulation of synaptic and neuronal functions. Compared with conventional ferromagnets, synthetic antiferromagnets (SAFs) exhibit unique and fascinating prop… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 044012] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: 面内磁场诱导的具有最小电导率的宇称反常半金属
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Binbin Wang, Jiayuan Hu, Bo Fu, Jiaqi Li, Yunchuan Kong, Kai-Zhi Bai, Shun-Qing Shen, and Di Xiao
作者：王彬彬、胡嘉媛、付博、李家齐、孔云川、白开智、沉顺庆、肖迪 拓扑材料与局域对称性破缺之间的相互作用产生了多种拓扑量子现象。一个著名的例子是奇偶校验反常半金属（PAS），它具有单个不成对的无间隙狄拉克锥，具有半整数量子化霍尔电导率。在这里，我们意识到这个阶段...... [物理。莱特牧师。 136, 146602] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 6 日星期一

item.title: Phase diagram and spin dynamics of the spin-frac32 bilinear-biquadratic-bicubic Heisenberg model on the square lattice
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Long Lian, Shun-Li Yu, Zhao-Yang Dong, and Jian-Xin Li
Author(s): Long Lian, Shun-Li Yu, Zhao-Yang Dong, and Jian-Xin Li Multipolar interactions play a pivotal role in governing emergent phenomena in quantum materials, including multiferroics and quantum magnetism. In this work, we determine the ground-state phase diagram of the nearest-neighbor spin-frac32 bilinear-biquadratic-bicubic Heisenberg model on the s… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 155111] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Physics-informed time series analysis with Kolmogorov-Arnold networks under Ehrenfest constraints
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 Abhijit Sen, Illya V. Lukin, Kurt Jacobs, Lev Kaplan, Andrii G. Sotnikov, and Denys I. Bondar
Author(s): Abhijit Sen, Illya V. Lukin, Kurt Jacobs, Lev Kaplan, Andrii G. Sotnikov, and Denys I. Bondar The prediction of quantum dynamical responses lies at the heart of modern physics. Yet, modeling these time-dependent behaviors remains a formidable challenge because quantum systems evolve in high-dimensional Hilbert spaces, often rendering traditional numerical methods computationally prohibitive.… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023018] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Quantum melting a Wigner crystal into Hall liquids
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Aidan P. Reddy and Liang Fu
Author(s): Aidan P. Reddy and Liang Fu Recent experiments have shown that, counterintuitively, applying a magnetic field to a Wigner crystal can induce quantum Hall effects. In this Letter, we use variational Monte Carlo to show that a magnetic field can melt zero-field Wigner crystals into integer quantum Hall liquids. This melting orig… [Phys. Rev. B 113, L161403] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Quantum phase diagram of the spin-frac12 Heisenberg antiferromagnet on the square-kagome lattice: A tensor network study
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Saeed S. Jahromi and Yasir Iqbal
Author(s): Saeed S. Jahromi and Yasir Iqbal We study the ground-state phase diagram of the spin-1/2 antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the square-kagome lattice using infinite projected entangled-pair states. By systematically varying the ratio of exchange couplings on triangular and square plaquettes, we establish a complete quantum pha… [Phys. Rev. B 113, L140402] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Revised crystal structure, disordered spin dynamics, and dichotomous magnetic excitations in a field-induced intermediate state of the honeycomb Kitaev magnet Na₂Co₂TeO₆
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Suheon Lee, Poonam Yadav, Raju Kalaivanan, Xianghan Xu, Kapil Kumar, Matthias J. Gutmann, Christian Balz, J. Ross Stewart, Chennan Wang, Zurab Guguchia, Hubertus Luetkens, Sang-Wook Cheong, Raman Sankar, Kwang-Yong Choi, and Sungkyun Choi
Author(s): Suheon Lee, Poonam Yadav, Raju Kalaivanan, Xianghan Xu, Kapil Kumar, Matthias J. Gutmann, Christian Balz, J. Ross Stewart, Chennan Wang, Zurab Guguchia, Hubertus Luetkens, Sang-Wook Cheong, Raman Sankar, Kwang-Yong Choi, and Sungkyun Choi Here, the authors report the dichotomous nature of magnetic excitations in a field-induced intermediate state of Na 2 Co 2 TeO 6 , a leading candidate for a Kitaev quantum spin liquid in 3 d -based systems. Using inelastic neutron scattering and muon experiments, they observe low-energy magnons and high-energy spinons in high magnetic fields, along with disordered spin dynamics. A revised crystal structure reveals a triangular Na layer that can better stabilize the spin liquid state under magnetic fields. [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134411] Published M…

item.title: Temperature and conductivity in shock compressed bridgmanite MgSiO₃ up to 2phantomůle0.28em0exTPa
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 M. F. Huff, M. C. Marshall, L. E. Hansen, N. Ozaki, T. Suer, Z. Lin, D. N. Polsin, D. J. Erskine, F. Gonzalez-Cataldo, T. Sato, K. Katagiri, T. Okuchi, D. E. Fratanduono, T. Sano, M. Noda, T. Inoue, T. Irifune, T. Shinmei, K. Ohara, B. J. Henderson, X. Gong, Z. K. Sprowal, S. Seager, J. R. Rygg, and G. W. Collins
Author(s): M. F. Huff, M. C. Marshall, L. E. Hansen, N. Ozaki, T. Suer, Z. Lin, D. N. Polsin, D. J. Erskine, F. Gonzalez-Cataldo, T. Sato, K. Katagiri, T. Okuchi, D. E. Fratanduono, T. Sano, M. Noda, T. Inoue, T. Irifune, T. Shinmei, K. Ohara, B. J. Henderson, X. Gong, Z. K. Sprowal, S. Seager, J. R. Rygg, and G. W. Collins Bridgmanite (MgSiO 3 ) is a major mantle constituent of rocky planets. Here, experimental temperature and reflectivity measurements in shock-compressed bridgmanite constrain its electrical conductivity at conditions relevant to super-Earth interiors. Comparison with prior studies indicates conductivity rises at lower pressures and temperatures than many models assume, suggesting silicate mantles may contribute to magnetic field generation over a broader range of condit…

item.title: Tunable Multi‐Level Memory States in Compositionally Graded Lead‐Free Ferroelectric Thin Films
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Jinyang Li, Suzhen Liu, Tao Wang, Zhongqi Ren, Cheng Gao, Fenghui Gong, Xiaodong Lv, Chen Su, Sujit Das, Hao Pan, Yunlong Tang, Zuhuang Chen
Advanced Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: Tunable polarization and band gap in ferroelectric nitride perovskites via superlattice design
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Yixin Jiao, Lixiang Rao, Zuolong Jia, Xiao Xie, Zunyi Deng, Bonan Zhu, Gang Tang, and Jiawang Hong
Author(s): Yixin Jiao, Lixiang Rao, Zuolong Jia, Xiao Xie, Zunyi Deng, Bonan Zhu, Gang Tang, and Jiawang Hong Superlattice engineering has proven to be a practical approach for modulating the functional properties of oxide perovskites in both theoretical and experimental research. Recently, some nitride perovskites have been successfully synthesized; however, several of them display metallic behavior, highl… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134105] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Tunneling magnetoresistance in a junction made of X-wave magnets with X=p, d, f, g, i
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Motohiko Ezawa
Author(s): Motohiko Ezawa We investigate the tunneling magnetoresistance (TMR) of a bilayer system made of X-wave magnets with X=p,d,f,g,i, where X=d,g,i corresponds to altermagnets. A universal analytic formula is derived for the TMR ratio. It is proportional to |J|/(NXΓ) for small Γ, where … [Phys. Rev. B 113, 155303] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026

item.title: Charge‐Tunable Dense Dual‐Atom Nanozymes Reprogram Biothiol Metabolism Through Multi‐Enzyme‐Mimetic Catalysis to Synergistically Induce Ferroptosis and Disulfidptosis
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Rui Niu, Yang Liu, Bin Zhang, Bo Xu, Zhijia Lv, Ruiping Deng, Shuyan Song, Kai Liu, Yinghui Wang, Hongjie Zhang
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.

item.title: Si/diamond thermal boundary conductance enhanced by SiNₓ and amorphous carbon interlayers
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Khalid Zobaid Adnan, Tanvirul Abedien, and Tianli Feng
Author(s): Khalid Zobaid Adnan, Tanvirul Abedien, and Tianli Feng Thermal boundary conductance (TBC) between silicon and diamond influences heat removal in next-generation electronics where Si and diamond serve as substrates or channels. In this paper, we report simulations of Si/diamond interfaces using machine-learning interatomic potential… [Phys. Rev. Applied 25, 044013] Published Mon Apr 06, 2026
